text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... My eyes! They're so itchyyy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! Tickezo, are you okay?! I know it's hard,
but if you scratch 'em, they might start swell'n up.
Stay strong for me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Right, I'm strong! Sorry for worrying you, Yuki!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I was just so happy that everyone celebrated my
birthday with me today, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Every time I think about that, the tears start
flowing... I-I'b juss sooo habbyyy!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I-I can't... I can't bring m'self to tell her! I couldn't
possibly make Tickezo suffer even more!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hm? Yuki, didja say my name?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
N-not at all! I was just think'n I better give you
the waist warmer I got you t'morrow...
